started_at_parsing.details: 1. In tui/src/network.rs, add 'pub started_at: String' to JobMetrics and test mock data. 2. In tui/src/app.rs, add dummy 'started_at' ISO8601 strings to the mock app.jobs.

visual_overhaul.details: 1. In tui/src/ui.rs, implement render_tabs with ratatui::widgets::Tabs. 2. Update render_metric_chart to format the X-axis labels from started_at. If app.window == WMax, format as 'MM-DD'. Else 'HH:MM'. Use these as the &str labels in BarChart data.
